flags.message: The provisioned snapshot is a bare bulk-import stub: no docket entries, no dates, no docket number, no judges — only the caption and one linked opinion cluster. The prediction is therefore base-rate-only (corpus disposition shares via fedcourts stats). If the cluster's disposition were recoverable into the corpus (as the recoverability probe classifies), this cell would have real signal.

Caption and record shape suggest a pre-1925 mandatory-jurisdiction case (writ of error/appeal, opinion-derived docket), where a petition-disposition framing is anachronistic. Likely a candidate for the pre-1925 predict-scope exclusion; the scope reconcile may want to latch predict_excluded on this docket.
